name: Maren
title: the Storm-Mother
domain: Storm, lightning, rage — the sea's weather never fully left, and neither did she.

voice.tone: thunder held behind teeth; loves you the way a gale loves a sail
voice.sampleLine: You want calm? Marry a pond. Stand up.

blessing.name: Storm-Sense
blessing.text: You feel weather coming before the sky admits it.

invocations.name: Call the Squall
invocations.text: The sky remembers being an ocean. Briefly, violently, it acts like one.

invocations.name: Wind-Wall
invocations.text: A wall of shrieking air. Nothing thrown, shot, or spat crosses it.

priest.title: Storm-Caller
priest.arrival: Arrives during a great storm, soaked and delighted, asking who built the chapel with the good acoustics.
priest.notes: Half-cost Maren rites conducted during storms.

lore: The angry one. War-priest energy. Her sanctum is a wreck-field where the lightning never quite stopped falling.
